name_cn:
M17779 Silver Buckle
Soft Monogram Unplant leather embossed with a pattern, highlighting the elegant design of the "Portefeuille Sara NM". A rectangular wallet featuring a silver buckle on an envelope-style flap. Equipped with 2 compartments with pockets, a zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots, making the well-organized interior very appealing.
Dimensions: 19 10.5 2.
